steps.title: Add the congruent sides
steps.content:
The two congruent sides are each $24$ feet, so together they measure
$$24+24=48$$

steps.title: Subtract from the perimeter
steps.content:
The perimeter is $84$ feet, so the third side is
$$84-48=36$$

steps.title: Select the matching length
steps.content: The third side is $36$ feet long. The answer is C.
